prompt_text:
### Demographics: 58-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 15 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
Heart failure: HFpEF (NYHA Class II)
MASH
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Diabetic Foot Ulcer / High-Risk Foot
Major Depressive Disorder
Urolithiasis (status post lithotripsy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF: HFpEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD (No); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (maternal grandmother)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 3 years ago; 10 cigarettes/day for 5 years; ~2.5 pack-years); Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Dapagliflozin 10mg once daily; Sertraline (50 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 82.5 kg; Height 177.8 cm; BMI 26.1 kg/m²; Blood pressure 111/70 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 10.0%; 9 months ago 9.5%; 6 months ago 9.1%; 3 months ago 8.6%; current 8.0%), FPG (12 months ago 235mg/dL; 9 months ago 234mg/dL; 6 months ago 221mg/dL; 3 months ago 238mg/dL; current 189mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 85.3kg; 9 months ago 80.7kg; 6 months ago 80.2kg; 3 months ago 82.7kg; current 82.5kg), Height (12 months ago 177.8cm; 9 months ago 177.8cm; 6 months ago 177.8cm; 3 months ago 177.8cm; current 177.8cm), BMI (12 months ago 27.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 26.0kg/m²; current 26.1kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 111mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 66mmHg; 9 months ago 66mmHg; 6 months ago 67mmHg; 3 months ago 69mmHg; current 70mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 102U/L; 9 months ago 103U/L; 6 months ago 107U/L; 3 months ago 102U/L; current 107U/L), AST (12 months ago 56U/L; 9 months ago 55U/L; 6 months ago 62U/L; 3 months ago 54U/L; current 59U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.4mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.4mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.5mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.5mg/dL; current 1.5mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 45mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 41mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 40mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 43mL/min/1.73m²; current 41mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 86mg/g; 9 months ago 119mg/g; 6 months ago 122mg/g; 3 months ago 138mg/g; current 136mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 74mg/dL; 9 months ago 73mg/dL; 6 months ago 70mg/dL; 3 months ago 69mg/dL; current 72mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 39mg/dL; 9 months ago 42mg/dL; 6 months ago 39mg/dL; 3 months ago 38mg/dL; current 40mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 135mg/dL; 9 months ago 153mg/dL; 6 months ago 134mg/dL; 3 months ago 153mg/dL; current 143mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 9.4g/dL; 9 months ago 9.4g/dL; 6 months ago 10.1g/dL; 3 months ago 9.9g/dL; current 9.6g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
